---
description: "Use when working on privacy, security, logs, telemetry, SMS data, storage, backups, exports, AI insights, or cloud sync."
---

# Privacy And Security Guidelines

- Treat all personal finance data as sensitive.
- Never commit real SMS text, sender IDs, UPI IDs, account numbers, phone numbers, transaction references, exported databases, backups, or screenshots with financial details.
- Store only structured transaction data unless the user explicitly enables encrypted raw-source diagnostics.
- Redact examples with placeholders such as `REDACTED STORE`, `XX0000`, and `SYNTH001`.
- Keep telemetry opt-in and free of PII, merchant names, exact amounts, and raw message content.
- Review any cloud or AI feature for consent, retention, deletion, export, and failure modes.
